Yeh Awarapan 🕊️
 
Combining Amaal Mallik’s composition, Rashmi Virag’s lyrics and the arresting voice of Arijit Singh, ‘Yeh Awarapan’ is the second song release from the highly awaited ‘Awarapan 2’. Featuring Emraan Hashmi in the video, the song combines his past and present to show how his constant companion is only his Awarapan ❤️‍🩹

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: The Minecraft Void is Not Infinite.
snippet.description:
25 million blocks below the void, land begins to generate...

JOIN OR DIE: https://discord.gg/3PwwWDAugZ

email me: sawyercontent3@gmail.com

thank you channel members : )

IF YOU THINK THIS IS FAKE, READ:
This is an adventure story following my travels through the theoretical limits of Minecraft and to the very bottom of a world. The minimum build limit makes the Voidlands impossible to reach, but by removing it Minecraft will generate the Voidlands just as it generates any other terrain.

Cubic chunks was used to remove minimum build limit and an offset was used past 2 billion blocks because MC won’t let you go there at all.

oh... and I maybe took some "creative freedom" going forward about halfway through the video. I felt that it got a little dull past around 10m blocks so I fixed that.

MORE INFO ABOUT THE VOIDLANDS:
https://youtu.be/-w6okOz-iNs?is=zYs8How7SuOAOOyK

snippet.title: We Are ALL THE WAY BACK!!! Avengers Doomsday First Time Watching Trailer Reaction
snippet.description:

-----
Bonus Action (pReview'd's DnD Actual Play Show): https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCMWISxq39GTafF2_xkXaKOw
pReview'd Gaming Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFln_0Sjdel34_VhFIgejvQ

Get ready for the ultimate hype as pReview'd dives into the Avengers: Doomsday trailer for a first-time watching trailer reaction! Adam and Jay are back to break down every mind-blowing moment from this massive Marvel reveal. From the chilling introduction of Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom—including that epic flex blocking Thor’s hammer—to the surprising return of Shang-Chi and the Fox X-Men characters, we analyze what this "passing of the torch" means for the MCU. We discuss the high stakes Thor warns about, the possibility of a "multiverse proof of life" for our favorite heroes, and why the Russo Brothers have us more excited than ever for the future of the Avengers. Stick around until the end to see our final trailer rating and find out why we think Marvel is officially all the way back!

snippet.title: I DIDN'T Love the Avengers: Doomsday Trailer...
snippet.description:
YOU CAN’T JUST CASUALLY DROP AN AVENGERS TRAILER ON ME LIKE THAT!? ARE YOU INSANE!? At least now we FINALLY know what to expect from Doomsday after years of wondering how Marvel would make the Doctor Doom pivot work. Even with all my hesitations, I’m happy to admit that this trailer moved me. I’m only human, you show me a bunch of superheroes interacting and I’m going to get excited! But overall, I honestly don’t know how to feel about this movie. I WANT it to be great, I WANT it to subvert my expectations, I WANTED the first PROPER trailer would ease my concerns, but it’s kinda funny to think that the two biggest selling points are what I’m most worried about.

localized.title: I DIDN'T Love the Avengers: Doomsday Trailer...
localized.description:
YOU CAN’T JUST CASUALLY DROP AN AVENGERS TRAILER ON ME LIKE THAT!? ARE YOU INSANE!? At least now we FINALLY know what to expect from Doomsday after years of wondering how Marvel would make the Doctor Doom pivot work. Even with all my hesitations, I’m happy to admit that this trailer moved me. I’m only human, you show me a bunch of superheroes interacting and I’m going to get excited! But overall, I honestly don’t know how to feel about this movie. I WANT it to be great, I WANT it to subvert my expectations, I WANTED the first PROPER trailer would ease my concerns, but it’s kinda funny to think that the two biggest selling points are what I’m most worried about.
